description: Replaced the home page with an Instagram-style social feed showing recent submissions from the community.
Submission creation and editing forms now open in a full-screen modal for a more focused, consistent experience.
The site logo in the header now always navigates to the home page regardless of the current section.
Fixed missing translation namespaces on public pages that could cause untranslated text to appear.
Added automated release workflow with changelog management, version bumping, and Discord changelog posting.
